keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY MAMMÆ. Mammæ : Bell., Bry., Carb-an., Cham., Con., Hyds., Iod., Lac-c., Pho., Phyt., Sil. Mammæ, right : Kali-bi., Sil. Mammæ, left : Bor., Bov., Lil-t., Lyc., Phel. Mammæ, alternating sides : Pul. Mammæ, backward : Crot-t., Form., Laur., Lil-t., Til. Mammæ, backward, left : Form. Mammæ, below , left : Ap., Bry., Bur-p. Mammæ, below, right : Carb-an., Caust., Chel., Cimi., Grap., Laur., Lil-t., Pho., Sul., Ust. Mammæ, lactation : Bell., Cham., Merc., Pul., Sep., Sil. Mammæ, milk , in breasts (of non-pregnant) : Asaf., Bur-p., Cycl., Merc., Pul. Mammæ, milk, altered : Bell., Merc. Mammæ, milk, escaping : Calc-c. Mammæ, milk, flowing, as if : Dict., Kre., Nux-v., Pul. Mammæ, milk, increased : Bell., Bry., Phyt., Pul. Mammæ, milk, scant, absent, etc. : Ag-c., Bry., Calc-c., Dulc., Lac-c., Lact., Pul., Urt-u., Zin. Mammæ, milk, spoiled : Aeth., Calc-c., Cham., Sil. Mammæ, menses , before, agg. : Bry., Calc-c., Con., Kali-m., Lac-c., Phyt., Pul. Mammæ, sore , painful : Arn., Calc-c., Con., Lac-c., Phyt. Mammæ, swelled : Bell., Bry., Con., Pho., Phyt., Pul., Sil.
